name: Maloghurst The Twisted
titles: Maloghurst The Twisted The Warmaster’s Equerry, Bearer of the Eye, The Shadowed Hand
lore: A veteran Legionary who had served throughout numerous campaigns, Maloghurst earned himself the title ‘The Twisted’ by way of his formidable mind, devoting his ever)’ effort to the role of equerry to his Primarch Horus Lupercal. The title found cruel double meaning after Maloghurst was left crippled during the Great Crusade, allowing him to devote himself fully to his role as his master’s advisor. In serving the Warmaster with such diligence, Maloghurst would share his damnation. By the time of the Isstvan III betrayal, Maloghurst was one of the Warmaster’s closest counsellors as well as the bearer of his iron-bound icon of the eye.
